titleStmt.title: SII 29.203: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 203. (A.R. No. B. 461 of 1961-62.) DHARMAPURI, MOMINABAD TALUK, BHIR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Impression received from Dy. Dir. Arch., Aurangabad, Maharashtra.

At the beginning the various merchant groups belonging to the guild the Five hundred Svāmis of Baṇajigas have been mentioned and are eulogized. The way in which Indrasēna, Rudrasēna and Bhadrasēna are euologised in the record is interesting. They are stated to be dharmapālādhipati (protectors of dharma) and probably belonging to Haihaya family. It records a grant of income from various taxes (specified) for the worship of the god and feeding of ascetics by the paṁcha-paṭṭaṇa of Pottalakere, the Kaṁchagaras and Teluṅga-nagaras. The grant was entrusted to Mahāvīra-paṇḍita of Yāpanīya-Saṁgha and Vamdiyūrgaṇa, the āchārya of Be[ma]ki seṭṭiya basadi of Dharmapura. The place names Kōgaḷi, Banavase, Baḷḷigave and Veḷugave (?) are mentioned here. At the beginning a few lines are lost and the record stops abruptly.
The record is in characters of the 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
seṭṭiyuṁ rāyana seṭṭiyaṁ tuppada mahādēvase
reseṭṭiyuṁ jālaṁdanuligiseṭṭiyuṁ jakkala bammiseṭṭiyuṁ
dēvaśāseṭṭiyuṁ kogaḷiyu naliṟaṟaseṭṭi guttaṁ hima
kāḍiseṭṭiyamarmma hiṭki seṭṭiyuṁ modalāgi hāva
banavāseya baḷḷigāveya veḷugāveya samastanānādēśa
di ṣāṁtaraṁgaḷa baṇajigarainūrbbaruṁ svāmigaḷuṁ matta naḍavaradāḷu
byavahārigaḷoḷage digbhuvāviya prōti bhaṭṭaruṁ sivvarājanuṁ be
mallaparājanuṁ sāyiparājanuṁ komtiseṭṭiyuṁ modalāgi
samasta bhramāṁtukaruṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda sāmaṁ
tādhipati phaṇīṁdra vaṁśōdbhava rījemadanāgarāja kṣatriya hai
hayavaṁśa gaṁgāryyāṁta māyāpuraparamēśvaraṁ Ēkavīra kri
tavīraṁ kārttyavīraṁ rājādhirāja puraparamēśvaraṁ paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ sahasrabāhūdbhava naraśiradarppaṇa dvajaṁ mārppaṟaya
ghōṣaṇaṁ madhya dēśādhipati haihayānvaya prasūta śrī bhadra
kāḷilabdhavaraprasādaṁ camararāja kanakadaṇḍa cāmara virājitānū
na śvētātapatra dvajapaṭṭapatākādi samanvitaratyuttamācā
raruṁ paṁcalōhādhipatigaḷuṁ dakṣiṇa śrīrakāḷānvayaṁ sō
mavaṁśōdbhavaṁ caṁdrārkkatējōpa śōbhita kaṭaka kaṭisūtra kuṁḍaḷa kē
yūrahāra hāvabhāva viḷāsa vibhrama viḷāsēyaruṁ samutpatti
śvēti śvētāṁgi nīśveta māḷinī śvēta prabhāṁginī tasya garbbha saṁbhūtasya Iṁ
drasēna rudrasēna bhadrasēna dharmma pāḷādhipati pūrvācāryyaṁ
pratiṣṭhitamuṁtatsuruṁ parirakṣitaṁ caṁdragupta mahimānama
rddhanaṁ Ēvaṁ vivarjjita muktāvaḷīḷaṁkrita prabaḷakhaḷa śōbhita ru
maṇḍaḷa pārijātā śōka caṁpakavakuḷa malli tiḷaka punnāga nā ga
mu makuṁda naṁdyāvartta jādi mallikāmōda kētakī sugaṁdha puṣpōpa
vara māyavi sōttara saṁmadhināyakāya śrī kirtti kalyāṇabhyu
dayaṁ śrīmatu poddaḷakeṟe pramukha paṁcapaṭṭaṇaṁgaḷa kaṁcigāṟarusa
masta teluṁganagaraṁgaḷaśēṣa muṁkūḍi śrīmatu paṭṭaṇaṁ dharmapurada da
dakṣiṇa diśā bāgada śrīyāpanīya saṁghada vadiyūrggaṇada bema
ki seṭṭiya basadiya Ācāryaru mahāvīra paṁḍitadēvara kālaṁ
karcci dēvara pratiṣṭhākāladalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara trikāla
pūjegaṁ khaṁḍasphaṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ riṣiyarāhāra
kkaṁ koṭṭa dharmmavedaṁteṁdoḍe paṭṭaṇada ṭaṁkasāleyalu thaḷake
bhūsada hēṟiṁge saṭṭuga 1 Uppina hēṟiṁge nūṟake drama
Aṁgaḍi pratyayaṁ kavaḍikavi Eleya hēṟiṁge nūṟele pasāradiṁ
bīdi panne 1 gāṇigaralli ciṭike (hā) 1 beraṇi hu(ha)ḷḷigaḷalli sivuṟoṁdu ka
(ṇi)ke hulla baṁḍige sūḍoṁdu marada bidirabhaṁḍige maranoṁduStops abruptly here.
Digital edition of SII 29.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
